headings: CONDITIONAL WAIVER AND RELEASE OF LIEN UPON PROGRESS PAYMENT
text: The undersigned, being duly sworn, states that (s)he is an authorized agent for [SUBCONTRACTOR NAME] ('Subcontractor'). Pursuant to its Subcontract Agreement with Contractor, and in consideration of the sum of $ Net Amount AFTER Retainage , Subcontractor hereby conditionally waives and releases its lien and right to claim a lien for labor, services, or materials furnished through Date of Pay Application (the 'Release Date') to GS Construction Mountain, LLC ('Contractor') , for incorporation into GSC Birchway Commerce City (the 'Project') owned by GS Commerce City Apt Owner, LLC ('Owner') being constructed on the following real property (the 'Property'):
